sections.title: Introduction
sections.description: Overview of the research topic, research questions, objectives, and importance of the study.

sections.title: Literature Review
sections.description: Summary of existing research related to the topic, pointing out gaps the study will address.

sections.title: Methodology
sections.description: Survey design, participant selection, recruitment, and data collection instruments.

sections.title: Results
sections.description: Findings of the survey analysis, using tables and graphs to illustrate key points.

sections.title: Discussion
sections.description: Interpretation of results in relation to research questions, comparison with existing literature, and implications.

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.description: Summary of main findings, importance of the study, and suggestions for further research.
